response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with direct alignment to the role's core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) plus current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a rare and specifically requested skill. Demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), polyglot breadth, and ownership of production systems at scale make this a strong senior IC fit.
strengths: Direct stack match with deep TS/Node/React/Mongo experience
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work aligns with a specifically required skill
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, workshops
concerns: Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java in recent roles
Cloud experience skews AWS — no GCP/Azure mentioned
